archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy / Trust mixed with 4 Swiss & High-Contrast Fintech)

typography.font_family_primary: System Native (SF Pro Display / Inter) or Plus Jakarta Sans

button.primary: bg-[#4F46E5] text-white h-[48px] rounded-[12px] flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-base shadow-sm
button.secondary: bg-[#F3F4F6] text-[#111827] h-[48px] rounded-[12px] flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-base
button.outline: border-2 border-[#E5E7EB] text-[#111827] h-[48px] rounded-[12px] flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-base
button.danger: bg-[#DC2626] text-white h-[48px] rounded-[12px] flex items-center justify-center font-semibold text-base

bottom_sheet.drag_indicator: w-[40px] h-[4px] bg-[#E5E7EB] rounded-full self-center mb-[16px]

list_item.container: flex flex-row items-center justify-between py-[12px] border-b border-[#E5E7EB]
list_item.avatar: w-[40px] h-[40px] rounded-full bg-[#E5E7EB] flex items-center justify-center text-[#6B7280] font-medium

quantity_selector.container: flex flex-row items-center bg-[#F3F4F6] rounded-[12px] p-[4px]
quantity_selector.button: w-[32px] h-[32px] rounded-[8px] flex items-center justify-center text-[#111827] font-medium

Home.description: Dashboard for quick actions. Floating balance or recent activity.
Home.layout: Header with user profile, Hero card showing total owed/owing, grid of quick actions (Create Bill, Join Bill), Recent list.

Create_Bill.description: Scan receipt or enter total manually.
Create_Bill.layout: Camera view taking top 70%, bottom sheet for manual entry or confirmation.

Group_Lobby.description: Waiting room with QR code and shareable link.
Group_Lobby.layout: Centered large QR code with logo in middle, share button, real-time list of joined members below.

Item_Assignment.description: Members self-claim items with quantity selectors.
Item_Assignment.layout: List of receipt items. Each item has a title, price, and a quantity selector (0,1,2,3+) inline.

Summary.layout: Total split, tax, tips, and fees breakdown. Clear row for each user showing their exact total.

Funding_Progress.description: List of paid and pending members for a specific bill.
Funding_Progress.layout: Large progress bar at the top ($120/$180 collected). List of users grouped by Status: Paid (Green), Pending (Amber).

Payment.layout: Bottom sheet. Large amount display. 'Pay with Apple Pay' or generic 'Pay' button.

Success_Repayment.layout: Centered success checkmark, confetti logic, amount paid, and 'Back to Home' button.

Lead_Dashboard.description: Lead dashboard showing repayment progress and withdraw options.
Lead_Dashboard.layout: Overview of total collected. Withdraw section with 'Instant' vs 'Standard' options.

design_system_rules.accessibility: All interactive elements must include 'testID' attribute. Ensure minimum 4.5:1 contrast for text.
design_system_rules.icons: Use lucide-react-native for all icons. Ensure stroke width 2 for clear legibility.
design_system_rules.interactions: Use React Native Reanimated or standard LayoutAnimation for list additions. Provide Haptic feedback on quantity selection and payment success.
design_system_rules.forms: Inputs must be 48px high, rounded 12px, border-gray-200, focus state border-indigo.
design_system_rules.alignment: Left-align list items and form fields. Center-align empty states and success screens.

illustrations.empty_state: Use lucide-react-native 'Receipt' icon (size 64, color #E5E7EB) inside a subtle circular background.

images.description: Optional confetti/celebration for success screen (if using Image over Icon)

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React Native Expo application using NativeWind for Tailwind styling.
Map Tailwind colors directly to the exact hex codes provided: indigo-600 to #4F46E5, green-600 to #16A34A.
Follow mobile-first layout rules, meaning no max-width constraints, use flex-1 to fill the screen.
Apply testID attributes to all TouchableOpacity, Pressable, Button, and TextInput components.
For the item assignment screen, the quantity selector MUST be an inline row of selectable blocks (0, 1, 2, 3+) for rapid thumb tapping, not a dropdown.
Do not build HTML/web elements. This is React Native, use View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView.
Use standard safe area insets via react-native-safe-area-context.
All floating sticky buttons must include paddingBottom equal to the safe area bottom inset.
